Thanks for contributing to SimpleDisenchant!
Please fill out the sections below.
-->

## Summary
<!-- Brief description of what this PR does and why -->

## Type of change
<!-- Tick the box that applies. The commit message prefix should match. -->

- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix (patch version bump)
- [ ] `feat:` New feature (minor version bump)
- [ ] `feat!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` Breaking change (major version bump)
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor:` Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `perf:` Performance improvement
- [ ] `chore:` Maintenance, dependencies, build, CI

## Related issues
<!-- Link any related issues. Use "Closes #123" or "Refs #123". -->

Closes #

## Testing
<!-- How did you test this change? -->

- [ ] Tested in retail
- [ ] No errors with `/console scriptErrors 1`
- [ ] Tested with multiple bag configurations (if relevant)
- [ ] Tested in/out of combat (if relevant)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I have updated locales (`Locales/*.lua`) for any new user-facing strings
- [ ] I have run `luacheck` locally with no errors (or the CI lint passes)
- [ ] I have not committed any test files, secrets, or build artifacts
